CVE-2011-3727.title: DokuWiki 2009-12-25c allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive  ...
CVE-2011-3727.description: DokuWiki 2009-12-25c allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information via a direct request to a .php file, which reveals the installation path in an error message, as demonstrated by lib/tpl/index.php and certain other files.
